mapper.select: SELECT PROP_CD AS propCd, CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, LAT AS lat, LNG AS lng, NEARBY_RADIUS AS nearbyRadius FROM INV.CONCIERGE_PROPERTY_EXT WHERE PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INV.CONCIERGE_PROPERTY_EXT (PROP_CD, CMPX_CD, LAT, LNG, NEARBY_RADIUS, REG_USER, REG_DT) VALUES (#{propCd}, #{cmpxCd}, #{lat}, #{lng}, #{nearbyRadius}, #{regUser}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE INV.CONCIERGE_PROPERTY_EXT SET LAT = #{lat}, LNG = #{lng}, NEARBY_RADIUS = #{nearbyRadius}, MOD_USER = #{modUser}, MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd}
mapper.select: SELECT PROP_CD AS propCd, CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, FEATURE_CD AS featureCd, USE_YN AS useYn, SORT_ORD AS sortOrd, CONFIG_JSON AS configJson FROM INV.CONCIERGE_FEATURE WHERE PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} ORDER BY SORT_ORD

SELECT PROP_CD AS propCd, CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, FEATURE_CD AS featureCd, SORT_ORD AS sortOrd, CONFIG_JSON AS configJson FROM INV.CONCIERGE_FEATURE WHERE PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_ORD
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INV.CONCIERGE_FEATURE (PROP_CD, CMPX_CD, FEATURE_CD, USE_YN, SORT_ORD, CONFIG_JSON, REG_USER, REG_DT) VALUES (#{propCd}, #{cmpxCd}, #{featureCd}, #{useYn}, #{sortOrd}, #{configJson}, #{regUser}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE INV.CONCIERGE_FEATURE SET USE_YN = #{useYn}, SORT_ORD = #{sortOrd}, CONFIG_JSON = #{configJson}, MOD_USER = #{modUser}, MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} AND FEATURE_CD = #{featureCd}
mapper.select: SELECT PROP_CD AS propCd, CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, ITEM_CD AS itemCd, ITEM_NM AS itemNm, ITEM_NM_ENG AS itemNmEng, MAX_QTY AS maxQty, USE_YN AS useYn, SORT_ORD AS sortOrd FROM INV.CONCIERGE_AMENITY_ITEM WHERE PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_ORD
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INV.CONCIERGE_AMENITY_ITEM (PROP_CD, CMPX_CD, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, ITEM_NM_ENG, MAX_QTY, USE_YN, SORT_ORD, REG_USER, REG_DT) VALUES (#{propCd}, #{cmpxCd}, #{itemCd}, #{itemNm}, #{itemNmEng}, #{maxQty}, #{useYn}, #{sortOrd}, #{regUser}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT REQ_NO AS reqNo, PROP_CD AS propCd, CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, RESV_NO AS resvNo, RM_NO AS rmNo, ITEM_CD AS itemCd, QTY AS qty, MEMO AS memo, PROC_STAT_CD AS procStatCd, REG_DT AS regDt FROM INV.CONCIERGE_AMENITY_REQ WHERE PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} AND RESV_NO = #{resvNo} ORDER BY REG_DT DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INV.CONCIERGE_AMENITY_REQ (PROP_CD, CMPX_CD, RESV_NO, RM_NO, ITEM_CD, QTY, MEMO, PROC_STAT_CD, REG_USER, REG_DT) VALUES (#{propCd}, #{cmpxCd}, #{resvNo}, #{rmNo}, #{itemCd}, #{qty}, #{memo}, 'REQ', #{regUser}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT REQ_NO AS reqNo, PROP_CD AS propCd, CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, RESV_NO AS resvNo, RM_NO AS rmNo, CAR_NO AS carNo, CAR_TP AS carTp, MEMO AS memo, PMS_SYNC_YN AS pmsSyncYn, REG_DT AS regDt FROM INV.CONCIERGE_PARKING WHERE PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} AND RESV_NO = #{resvNo} ORDER BY REG_DT DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INV.CONCIERGE_PARKING (PROP_CD, CMPX_CD, RESV_NO, RM_NO, CAR_NO, CAR_TP, MEMO, PMS_SYNC_YN, REG_USER, REG_DT) VALUES (#{propCd}, #{cmpxCd}, #{resvNo}, #{rmNo}, #{carNo}, #{carTp}, #{memo}, 'N', #{regUser}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT REQ_NO AS reqNo, PROP_CD AS propCd, CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, RESV_NO AS resvNo, RM_NO AS rmNo, REQ_OUT_TM AS reqOutTm, ADD_AMT AS addAmt, CUR_CD AS curCd, RATE_TP_CD AS rateTpCd, PROC_STAT_CD AS procStatCd, REG_DT AS regDt FROM INV.CONCIERGE_LATE_CO WHERE PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} AND RESV_NO = #{resvNo} ORDER BY REG_DT DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INV.CONCIERGE_LATE_CO (PROP_CD, CMPX_CD, RESV_NO, RM_NO, REQ_OUT_TM, ADD_AMT, CUR_CD, RATE_TP_CD, PROC_STAT_CD, REG_USER, REG_DT) VALUES (#{propCd}, #{cmpxCd}, #{resvNo}, #{rmNo}, #{reqOutTm}, #{addAmt}, #{curCd}, #{rateTpCd}, 'REQ', #{regUser}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT PROP_CD AS propCd, CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, DEPT_CD AS deptCd, DEPT_NM AS deptNm, SORT_ORD AS sortOrd, USE_YN AS useYn FROM INV.CCS_DEPARTMENT WHERE PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} ORDER BY SORT_ORD, DEPT_CD

SELECT PROP_CD AS propCd, CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, DEPT_CD AS deptCd, DEPT_NM AS deptNm, SORT_ORD AS sortOrd, USE_YN AS useYn FROM INV.CCS_DEPARTMENT WHERE PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} AND DEPT_CD = #{deptCd}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INV.CCS_DEPARTMENT (PROP_CD, CMPX_CD, DEPT_CD, DEPT_NM, SORT_ORD, USE_YN, REG_USER, REG_DT) VALUES (#{propCd}, #{cmpxCd}, #{deptCd}, #{deptNm}, #{sortOrd}, 'Y', 'ADMIN', NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM INV.CCS_DEPARTMENT WHERE PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} AND DEPT_CD = #{deptCd}
mapper.select: SELECT TASK_ID AS taskId, SOURCE_TYPE AS sourceType, STATUS_CD AS statusCd, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM INV.CCS_TASK WHERE PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} AND RM_NO = #{rmNo} AND SOURCE_TYPE LIKE 'HK_%' ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INV.CCS_TASK WHERE ASSIGNEE_ID = #{assigneeId} AND STATUS_CD = #{statusCd}

SELECT TASK_ID AS taskId, PROP_CD AS propCd, CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, DEPT_CD AS deptCd, SOURCE_TYPE AS sourceType, SOURCE_REF_NO AS sourceRefNo, TITLE AS title, MEMO AS memo, RM_NO AS rmNo, ASSIGNEE_ID AS assigneeId, STATUS_CD AS statusCd, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM INV.CCS_TASK WHERE TASK_ID = #{taskId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INV.CCS_TASK (TASK_ID, PROP_CD, CMPX_CD, DEPT_CD, SOURCE_TYPE, SOURCE_REF_NO, TITLE, MEMO, RM_NO, ASSIGNEE_ID, STATUS_CD, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{propCd}, #{cmpxCd}, #{deptCd}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceRefNo}, #{title}, #{memo}, #{rmNo}, #{assigneeId}, #{statusCd}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE INV.CCS_TASK SET STATUS_CD = #{statusCd}, UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE TASK_ID = #{taskId}
UPDATE INV.CCS_TASK SET ASSIGNEE_ID = #{assigneeId}, STATUS_CD = #{statusCd}, UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE TASK_ID = #{taskId}
mapper.select: SELECT ASSIGNEE_ID AS assigneeId, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM INV.CCS_TASK WHERE PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} AND DEPT_CD = #{deptCd} AND STATUS_CD IN ('REQ','ASSIGNED','IN_PROG') GROUP BY ASSIGNEE_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INV.CCS_LOSTFOUND (LF_ID, PROP_CD, CMPX_CD, REPORTER_TYPE, REPORTER_REF, RM_NO, CATEGORY, ITEM_NAME, DESCRIPTION, LOCATION_HINT, FOUND_AT, STATUS_CD, HANDLER_ID, NOTE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT) VALUES (#{lfId}, #{propCd}, #{cmpxCd}, #{reporterType}, #{reporterRef}, #{rmNo}, #{category}, #{itemName}, #{description}, #{locationHint}, #{foundAt}, #{statusCd}, #{handlerId}, #{note}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT LF_ID AS lfId, PROP_CD AS propCd, CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, REPORTER_TYPE AS reporterType, REPORTER_REF AS reporterRef, RM_NO AS rmNo, CATEGORY AS category, ITEM_NAME AS itemName, DESCRIPTION AS description, LOCATION_HINT AS locationHint, FOUND_AT AS foundAt, MATCHED_LF_ID AS matchedLfId, STATUS_CD AS statusCd, HANDLER_ID AS handlerId, NOTE AS note, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM INV.CCS_LOSTFOUND WHERE LF_ID = #{lfId}
mapper.update: UPDATE INV.CCS_LOSTFOUND SET STATUS_CD = #{statusCd}, HANDLER_ID = COALESCE(#{handlerId}, HANDLER_ID), NOTE = COALESCE(#{note}, NOTE), UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE LF_ID = #{lfId}
UPDATE INV.CCS_LOSTFOUND SET MATCHED_LF_ID = #{matchedLfId}, STATUS_CD = 'MATCHED', HANDLER_ID = COALESCE(#{handlerId}, HANDLER_ID), UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE LF_ID = #{lfId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INV.CCS_VOC (VOC_ID, PROP_CD, CMPX_CD, RSV_NO, RM_NO, CATEGORY, SEVERITY, TITLE, CONTENT, STATUS_CD, HANDLER_ID, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT) VALUES (#{vocId}, #{propCd}, #{cmpxCd}, #{rsvNo}, #{rmNo}, #{category}, #{severity}, #{title}, #{content}, #{statusCd}, #{handlerId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT VOC_ID AS vocId, PROP_CD AS propCd, CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, RSV_NO AS rsvNo, RM_NO AS rmNo, CATEGORY AS category, SEVERITY AS severity, TITLE AS title, CONTENT AS content, STATUS_CD AS statusCd, HANDLER_ID AS handlerId, RESOLUTION AS resolution, SATISFACTION AS satisfaction, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, RESOLVED_AT AS resolvedAt FROM INV.CCS_VOC WHERE VOC_ID = #{vocId}
mapper.update: UPDATE INV.CCS_VOC SET STATUS_CD = #{statusCd}, HANDLER_ID = COALESCE(#{handlerId}, HANDLER_ID), UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE VOC_ID = #{vocId}
UPDATE INV.CCS_VOC SET STATUS_CD = 'RESOLVED', RESOLUTION = #{resolution}, HANDLER_ID = COALESCE(#{handlerId}, HANDLER_ID), RESOLVED_AT = NOW(), UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE VOC_ID = #{vocId}
UPDATE INV.CCS_VOC SET SATISFACTION = #{satisfaction}, UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE VOC_ID = #{vocId}
mapper.select: SELECT ITEM_ID AS itemId, PROP_CD AS propCd, CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, NAME AS name, DESCRIPTION AS description, CATEGORY AS category, STOCK_TOTAL AS stockTotal, STOCK_AVAILABLE AS stockAvailable, USE_YN AS useYn, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM INV.CCS_RENTAL_ITEM WHERE PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} ORDER BY CATEGORY, NAME

SELECT ITEM_ID AS itemId, PROP_CD AS propCd, CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, NAME AS name, DESCRIPTION AS description, CATEGORY AS category, STOCK_TOTAL AS stockTotal, STOCK_AVAILABLE AS stockAvailable, USE_YN AS useYn, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM INV.CCS_RENTAL_ITEM WHERE ITEM_ID = #{itemId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INV.CCS_RENTAL_ITEM (ITEM_ID, PROP_CD, CMPX_CD, NAME, DESCRIPTION, CATEGORY, STOCK_TOTAL, STOCK_AVAILABLE, USE_YN, CREATED_AT) VALUES (#{itemId}, #{propCd}, #{cmpxCd}, #{name}, #{description}, #{category}, #{stockTotal}, #{stockAvailable}, #{useYn}, NOW())

INSERT INTO INV.CCS_RENTAL_ORDER (ORDER_ID, PROP_CD, CMPX_CD, RSV_NO, ITEM_ID, QTY, STATUS_CD, REQUESTED_AT, DUE_AT, HANDLER_ID, NOTE) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{propCd}, #{cmpxCd}, #{rsvNo}, #{itemId}, #{qty}, #{statusCd}, NOW(), #{dueAt}, #{handlerId}, #{note})
mapper.select: SELECT ORDER_ID AS orderId, PROP_CD AS propCd, CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, RSV_NO AS rsvNo, ITEM_ID AS itemId, QTY AS qty, STATUS_CD AS statusCd, REQUESTED_AT AS requestedAt, LOANED_AT AS loanedAt, DUE_AT AS dueAt, RETURNED_AT AS returnedAt, HANDLER_ID AS handlerId, NOTE AS note FROM INV.CCS_RENTAL_ORDER WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId}
mapper.update: UPDATE INV.CCS_RENTAL_ORDER SET STATUS_CD = #{statusCd}, HANDLER_ID = COALESCE(#{handlerId}, HANDLER_ID), LOANED_AT = CASE WHEN #{statusCd} = 'LOANED' THEN NOW() ELSE LOANED_AT END, RETURNED_AT = CASE WHEN #{statusCd} = 'RETURNED' THEN NOW() ELSE RETURNED_AT END WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INV.CCS_DUTY_LOG (LOG_ID, PROP_CD, CMPX_CD, DUTY_DATE, SHIFT_CD, MANAGER_ID, HANDOVER_FROM, SUMMARY, INCIDENTS, PMS_AUDIT_DONE_YN, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT) VALUES (#{logId}, #{propCd}, #{cmpxCd}, #{dutyDate}, #{shiftCd}, #{managerId}, #{handoverFrom}, #{summary}, #{incidents}, #{pmsAuditDoneYn}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT LOG_ID AS logId, PROP_CD AS propCd, CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, DUTY_DATE AS dutyDate, SHIFT_CD AS shiftCd, MANAGER_ID AS managerId, HANDOVER_FROM AS handoverFrom, HANDOVER_TO AS handoverTo, SUMMARY AS summary, INCIDENTS AS incidents, PMS_AUDIT_DONE_YN AS pmsAuditDoneYn, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM INV.CCS_DUTY_LOG WHERE PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} AND DUTY_DATE >= #{dutyDateFrom} AND DUTY_DATE <= #{dutyDateTo} ORDER BY DUTY_DATE DESC, SHIFT_CD ASC

SELECT LOG_ID AS logId, PROP_CD AS propCd, CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, DUTY_DATE AS dutyDate, SHIFT_CD AS shiftCd, MANAGER_ID AS managerId, HANDOVER_FROM AS handoverFrom, HANDOVER_TO AS handoverTo, SUMMARY AS summary, INCIDENTS AS incidents, PMS_AUDIT_DONE_YN AS pmsAuditDoneYn, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM INV.CCS_DUTY_LOG WHERE LOG_ID = #{logId}

SELECT LOG_ID AS logId, PROP_CD AS propCd, CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, DUTY_DATE AS dutyDate, SHIFT_CD AS shiftCd, MANAGER_ID AS managerId, HANDOVER_FROM AS handoverFrom, HANDOVER_TO AS handoverTo, SUMMARY AS summary, INCIDENTS AS incidents, PMS_AUDIT_DONE_YN AS pmsAuditDoneYn, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM INV.CCS_DUTY_LOG WHERE PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} AND DUTY_DATE = CURDATE() AND SHIFT_CD = #{shift} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE INV.CCS_DUTY_LOG SET HANDOVER_TO = #{handoverTo}, SUMMARY = COALESCE(#{summary}, SUMMARY), INCIDENTS = COALESCE(#{incidents}, INCIDENTS), UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE LOG_ID = #{logId}

UPDATE INV.CCS_DUTY_LOG SET SUMMARY = COALESCE(#{summary}, SUMMARY), INCIDENTS = COALESCE(#{incidents}, INCIDENTS), PMS_AUDIT_DONE_YN = COALESCE(#{pmsAuditDoneYn}, PMS_AUDIT_DONE_YN), UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE LOG_ID = #{logId}
mapper.select: SELECT #{propCd} AS propCd, #{dateYmd} AS dateYmd, 'N' AS auditDoneYn, NULL AS auditAt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INV.CCS_AUDIT_LOG (AUDIT_ID, PROP_CD, CMPX_CD, ACTOR_ID, ACTOR_TYPE, ACTION, DOMAIN, ENTITY_ID, BEFORE_JSON, AFTER_JSON, CREATED_AT) VALUES (#{auditId}, #{propCd}, #{cmpxCd}, #{actorId}, #{actorType}, #{action}, #{domain}, #{entityId}, #{beforeJson}, #{afterJson}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT DATE(CREATED_AT) AS dateYmd, DEPT_CD AS deptCd, SOURCE_TYPE AS sourceType, COUNT(*) AS requestCount, SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS_CD = 'DONE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS doneCount, AVG(CASE WHEN STATUS_CD = 'DONE' THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT) END) AS avgElapsedMin FROM INV.CCS_TASK WHERE PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} AND CREATED_AT >= #{fromDt} AND CREATED_AT <= #{toDt} GROUP BY DATE(CREATED_AT), DEPT_CD, SOURCE_TYPE ORDER BY dateYmd DESC, deptCd, sourceType
SELECT MENU_CD AS menuCd, GRANTED AS granted, GRANTED_BY AS grantedBy, GRANTED_AT AS grantedAt FROM INV.CCS_ROLE_GRANT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY MENU_CD
SELECT MENU_CD FROM INV.CCS_ROLE_GRANT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND GRANTED = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INV.CCS_ROLE_GRANT (USER_ID, MENU_CD, GRANTED, GRANTED_BY, GRANTED_AT) VALUES (#{userId}, #{menuCd}, #{granted}, #{grantedBy}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE GRANTED = VALUES(GRANTED), GRANTED_BY = VALUES(GRANTED_BY), GRANTED_AT = VALUES(GRANTED_AT)
